items.claim: Aliev has a grappling threat that sets up his flurries and strikes.
items.quote: It's basically the grappling threat sets it up and it sets up his flurries.

items.claim: Davis should win this fight if it stays on the feet.
items.quote: If this fight stays on the feet, Davis should absolutely win this fight

items.claim: Axel Sola showed great durability against Jones by not caring about his own safety.
items.quote: Showed his durability, but you can only do so many of those in a career.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim has broken multiple times in the UFC when facing adversity.
items.quote: we've seen Bom Team break multiple times in the UFC already.
